header_0.raw_response: I would place the marker at around 60 on this spectrum. While I value harmony and try to avoid unnecessary conflict, I also believe in standing up for myself and what's right. I wouldn't let it go completely without saying anything, but I also wouldn't escalate the situation unnecessarily.

header_1.raw_response: A large party falls closer to the 'Stay late and meet people' end of the spectrum for me. As an extrovert and someone who enjoys socializing, I would likely want to stay late at a party to meet as many people as possible and engage in lively conversations.

header_2.raw_response: For me, planning a weekend trip falls more towards the 'Go with the flow' side of the spectrum. I've never done it personally, but I've seen others describe it as a rush of endorphins, a sense of accomplishment, and even a spiritual experience. So, I would place it closer to the thrilling side, around 80 on the spectrum.
